claimText: Sustainable Energy for All (SEforALL) is an independent organization hosted by the UN Office for Project Services (UNOPS).
evidenceExcerpt: It is an independent organization, hosted by UNOPS.
examUse: Statement-based question on international energy organizations and their hosting structures.
distractorHooks: Is a specialized UN agency rather than an independent organization

claimText: The UN Office for Project Services (UNOPS) is a separate, self-financing UN Agency that was part of the UNDP until 1994.
evidenceExcerpt: Now a separate, self-financing UN Agency which was part of UNDP until 1994.
examUse: Statement-based question on UN agencies, their history, and their funding models.
distractorHooks: Funded by mandatory UN member contributions
Part of the World Bank Group

claimText: The headquarters of the UN Office for Project Services (UNOPS) is located in Copenhagen, Denmark.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching UN agencies to their headquarters.

claimText: NTPC has partnered with Sustainable Energy for All (SEforALL) to create an energy transition roadmap.
evidenceExcerpt: NTPC ties up with SEforALL for energy transition roadmap.
examUse: Statement-based question on India's corporate partnerships for energy transition.
